description_long: This is a modern, freestanding, four-door refrigerator with a sleek, dark metallic finish. The front features two vertical doors on the upper section, with a built-in water and ice dispenser on the right door, and two horizontal freezer drawers below. The exterior is smooth and flat, with minimal visible seams, giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban homes or garages. The handles are integrated into the door edges, maintaining a streamlined appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents or grilles, and the overall form is boxy and robust. The refrigerator stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly above the ground.
description: A sleek, four-door dark metallic refrigerator with integrated handles and a front water/ice dispenser, featuring a modern, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two upper doors, a water/ice dispenser on the right, and two lower freezer drawers with integrated handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted metallic surface with no visible features or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat metallic back with no visible vents, grilles, or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a smooth, featureless metallic surface.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated vertical handles recessed into the door edges, flush with the surface for a streamlined look.
